_comment: IO contract schema for TOS atoms. Every atom accepts input conforming to the 'input' sub-schema and returns output conforming to the 'output' sub-schema. Orchestrators use this to validate hand-offs between atoms in a workflow chain.

input.description: Atom input envelope. Common fields shared by all atoms; atom-specific fields extend this.

atom.description: Name of the atom to invoke (must exist in atoms.json).

standard_code.description: Florida BEST or other standard code. Never fabricated.

context.description: Optional teacher-profile context passed from the orchestrator.

output.description: Atom output envelope. Every atom MUST return these fields; atom-specific fields extend this.

tool.description: Name of the atom that produced this output (matches input.atom).

human_review_required.description: Always true. No atom output is final without human review.

confidence.description: Self-assessed confidence in the output quality.

standard_code.description: Echo of the input standard code for traceability.

warnings.description: Any advisory flags or caveats the atom wants to surface.
